title: World’s biggest miner BHP backtracks on climate action with key projects put on ice, leaked documents reveal - The Guardian
summary_full: World’s biggest miner BHP backtracks on climate action with key projects put on ice, leaked documents reveal  The GuardianLeaked documents show Australia's richest company quietly shelved plans to go green  Australian Broadcasting CorporationFour Corners: May 25  TV Tonight | Australia's Leading TV BlogRevealed: the internal BHP memo that slammed the brakes on world’s biggest miner’s climate push  The GuardianBHP defies its own climate strategy to spend hundreds of millions on polluting diesel trucks in Pilbara  The Guardian
